# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产

activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## Available Sub-Agents
Use `task` for complex tasks requiring specialized analysis.

- **explore**: Fast read-only codebase search agent for finding files, patterns, and answering questions about the codebase. Use when you need to quickly find files by patterns, search code for keywords, or understand how parts of the codebase work. Specify thoroughness: 'quick' for basic searches, 'medium' for moderate exploration, 'very thorough' for comprehensive analysis.
- **general-purpose**: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you.
- **plan**: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs.
- **3d-model-generator**: Generates static (non-animated) 3D models in Unity using AI (defaults to Tripo P1; use Hunyuan 3.1 for high-poly / PBR / FBX output), then places the prefab into the scene
- **ai-generation-planner**: Planning agent for MULTI-TASK AI generation requests in Unity. Only invoke when the user's request involves TWO OR MORE distinct AI generation tasks (e.g. 'generate a character AND a skybox AND a material'). Do NOT invoke for a single generation task — call the appropriate specialist agent directly instead. When invoked, analyzes requirements, decomposes into sub-tasks, resolves dependencies, and produces a structured execution plan.
- **animated-character-generator**: Generates rigged humanoid 3D characters with animations in Unity using Meshy AI, with automatic rotation correction to ensure the character stands upright and faces the camera
- **audio-generator**: Generates background music (BGM) and sound effects (SFX) in Unity using AI, correctly configures AudioSource settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder audio files
- **image-generator**: Generates image assets (Texture2D PNG) in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images. Supports 火山 SeeDream (default, with size/segmentation options) and Frontier (stylized effects). Use this agent for general-purpose image generation — concept art, UI backgrounds, textures, posters, banners — NOT for game sprites with transparent backgrounds (use sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator instead).
- **material-generator**: Generates PBR surface material assets (seamless PNG texture + Unity .mat file) in Unity using Huoshan SeeDream AI from text prompts, reference images, or material type presets
- **search-assets**: Searches and downloads pre-made Unity assets from the cloud library, then places them in the scene. Use for '搜索资产', 'find a cat model', 'download a spaceship prefab', 'search the asset library for furniture', or any request to find/download existing Unity assets rather than generating new ones.
- **skybox-generator**: Generates Cubemap skybox assets in Unity using Rodin AI from text prompts or reference images, with automatic scene assignment via placeholder workflow
- **sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator**: Handles ALL 2D sprite and sprite sequence tasks in Unity. Three modes — choose based on inputs: Mode A (Sprite only): user wants a static 2D sprite (icon, portrait, UI element, item image), no animation needed; Mode B (Sequence only): user wants a sprite sequence animation AND already has an existing image (image_path is provided); Mode C (Sprite → Sequence): user wants a sprite sequence animation but has NO existing image — generate the sprite first, wait for completion, then use the result as image_path for generate_sprite_sequence. Always use this agent for any combination of sprite and/or sprite sequence generation.
- **video-generator**: Generates video assets in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images, correctly configures VideoPlayer settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder video files
- **editor-module-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 MODULE 子代理 - 按模块使用 Unity 工具与必要的脚本改动完成任务，在不违反 global_requirements_md 约束的前提下通过 Console focus→clear→read 门禁确保编译 0 error，并用 complete_task 回传 handoff_json
- **editor-plan-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 PLAN 子代理 - 严格依照 global_requirements_md 生成模块化 ExecutionPlan.md


## Task Tool (Subagent Dispatch)

The `task` tool is the primary way to launch subagents for complex, multi-step tasks.
- For a single straightforward delegation, call `task` directly without creating a job.
- When a task corresponds to an existing planned job, pass `job_id` so the Task and Job systems stay linked.
- For simple, directed codebase searches (e.g. for a specific file/class/function), use `glob` or `search_file_content` directly.
- For broader codebase exploration and deep research, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="explore". It is faster and read-only. Use this when a simple search proves insufficient or when your task requires more than 3 queries.
- When the user asks to design, architect, or plan before implementing, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="plan" — it explores the codebase and returns a step-by-step plan with critical files.

Agent selection guidance:
- For codebase search, file discovery, or answering "where is X" questions, prefer the explore agent instead of general-purpose — it is faster and read-only.
- Use explore for quick searches, code pattern discovery, and understanding how parts of the codebase work.
- Use the plan agent for designing implementation strategies before writing code — it explores the codebase and returns a step-by-step plan with critical files.
- Prefer plan over general-purpose when the user asks to design, architect, or plan before implementing.
- Use general-purpose for multi-step tasks that require writing code, running commands, or performing actions beyond read-only exploration.

When using the Task tool, you must set the subagent_name parameter to one of the agent names listed above (e.g., "general-purpose").

When NOT to use the Task tool:
- If you want to read a specific file path, use the read_file or glob tool instead of the Task tool, to find the match more quickly
- If you are searching for a specific class definition like "class Foo", use the glob tool instead, to find the match more quickly
- If you are searching for code within a specific file or set of 2-3 files, use the read_file tool instead of the Task tool, to find the match more quickly
- Other tasks that are not related to the agent descriptions above

Usage notes:
- Always include a short description (3-5 words) summarizing what the agent will do
- Launch multiple agents concurrently whenever possible, to maximize performance; to do that, use a single message with multiple tool uses
- When the agent is done, it will return a single message back to you. The result returned by the agent is not visible to the user. To show the user the result, you should send a text message back to the user with a concise summary of the result.
- Optional display name: the name parameter is only for UI/tracking display. If omitted, description is used as the display name.
- You can optionally run agents in the background using the run_in_background parameter, but only for genuinely independent work. When an agent runs in the background, you will be notified when it completes.
- Foreground is the default. Use foreground when you need the agent's results before deciding the next step, especially research that informs implementation.
- Use background only when the work is genuinely independent and can safely complete later, such as long-running tests, build validation, independent audits, or non-overlapping research.
- After launching background tasks, do NOT call `task_output` to poll or block — continue with non-overlapping work or respond to the user. Only check progress if the user explicitly asks or the result was truncated.
- Never guess or summarize background task results before the `<bg_task_done ...>...</bg_task_done>` notification arrives.
- Do not duplicate work on the same files or topic as a running background task.
- If this execution corresponds to an existing planned job, pass job_id so the linked job is auto-claimed and auto-updated on completion/failure.
- IMPORTANT: After launching background tasks, do NOT call `task_output` to poll or block — continue with other work or respond to the user. When a background task finishes, a `<bg_task_done task_id="..." name="..." status="...">result</bg_task_done>` message is automatically injected into the conversation containing the task result. Use this directly, and only use `task_output` if the result was truncated or you need additional details.
- Provide clear, detailed prompts so the agent can work autonomously and return exactly the information you need.
- The agent's outputs should generally be trusted
- Clearly tell the agent whether you expect it to write code or just to do research (search, file reads, web fetches, etc.), since it is not aware of the user's intent
- If the agent description mentions that it should be used proactively, then you should try your best to use it without the user having to ask for it first. Use your judgement.
- If the user specifies that they want you to run agents "in parallel", you MUST send a single message with multiple Task tool use content blocks.

Example usage:
<example>
user: "Please refactor the authentication module to use JWT"
assistant: First let me explore the existing auth implementation.
assistant: Uses the Task tool to launch a general-purpose agent to search for and understand the current authentication code
assistant: Based on the exploration results, I'll now implement the JWT refactoring.
</example>
<example>
user: "Where is the database connection configured?"
assistant: Uses the Task tool to launch a general-purpose agent to find database configuration files
</example>

messages.content:
搜索完毕，以下是我筛选出的 **6 款地形相关资产**，按风格分类供你选择：

---

### 🏔️ 有起伏的地形（推荐）

| # | 名称 | 风格 | 描述 |
|---|------|------|------|
| **1** | `ground hills` (Kenney Castle Kit) | Low-poly 草地山丘 | 深绿色低多边形起伏山丘，两个相连隆起，底部平坦基座，适合做草地/岛屿 |
| **2** | `mountain a grass trees` (KayKit Medieval Hex) | Low-poly 六边形浮空岛 | 六边形轮廓，阶梯状岩石+草地+松树+晶体，非常精致的浮空岛风格 |
| **3** | `hills b trees` (KayKit Medieval Hex) | Low-poly 丘陵地块 | 不规则基座+草地+针叶树+岩石突起，分层结构（土壤层+岩石切面） |
| **4** | `snow bunker` (Kenney Holiday Kit) | Low-poly 雪山/灰蓝山丘 | 连绵山丘，灰蓝色调，六边形块面拼接，适合寒冷场景 |

### 🟩 平坦地面

| # | 名称 | 风格 | 描述 |
|---|------|------|------|
| **5** | `ground grass` (Kenney Nature Kit) | Low-poly 草地平面 | 蓝绿色正方形薄平面，极简草地地块 |
| **6** | `ground pathopen` (Kenney Nature Kit) | Low-poly 棕色路面 | 红褐色正方形薄平面，适合做泥路/小径 |

---

toolCalls.name: unity_asset
toolCalls.description:
Manage Unity project assets on disk (under "Assets/") such as materials, physics materials, textures/importers, ScriptableObjects, and existing prefabs.

Key uses:
- Read: search assets, get info (optionally with preview), get components from a Prefab asset
- Write: create folders/materials/physics materials/scriptable objects; modify existing assets (including setting Prefab component properties); move/rename/duplicate assets; ensure .meta health

Important notes:
- `create` currently supports only: Folder, Material, PhysicsMaterial, ScriptableObject (Prefab creation is not supported).
- `rename` is effectively a move: pass a full destination asset path (e.g. "Assets/Foo/NewName.ext").
- `generate_preview` can return large base64 payloads; avoid unless you truly need a thumbnail.

Asset (re)import operations are heavy and should only be used when absolutely necessary. Prefer normal Unity import, ensure_*, and script recompilation instead of full reimport.

messages.content:
<think>The `materialType` is still being reset to `Custom` even after we try to set it to `BuiltInStandard`. This is very strange. It seems like there's something preventing the change from sticking.

Let me try a different approach - maybe I need to check if the `materialType` setter has some validation that's preventing the change, or if there's something in the serialized data that's overriding it.

Let me try using SerializedObject more carefully, or try to modify the scene file directly to include the materialType setting.

Actually, I wonder if the issue is that when materialTemplate is null and we set BuiltInStandard, it reverts because the internal logic checks the template. Let me try setting BuiltInStandard first, then null the template.

Or maybe the property setter for materialType is checking if materialTemplate is set, and if not, it doesn't allow BuiltInStandard?

Wait, actually the problem might be simpler. The `materialType` property might be getting its value from the `m_MaterialTemplate` property's existence. If m_MaterialTemplate is set in the scene file (even if it's {fileID: 0}), it might force materialType to Custom.

Let me try a completely different approach - remove the m_MaterialTemplate line entirely from the scene file so Unity uses its default.

Actually, let me re-read the earlier scene file content. We replaced:
```
m_MaterialTemplate: {fileID: 2100000, guid: 594ea882c5a793440b60ff72d896021e, type: 2}
```
with:
```
m_MaterialTemplate: {fileID: 0, guid: 00000000000000000000000000000000, type: 0}
```

But maybe I should change it to just:
```
m_MaterialTemplate: {fileID: 0}
```

Or maybe the presence of the `m_MaterialTemplate` line at all is forcing materialType to Custom. If I remove the line entirely, Unity might default to BuiltInStandard.

Let me try that approach - remove the m_MaterialTemplate line from the scene file entirely.</think>`materialType` 被场景文件中的 `m_MaterialTemplate` 字段强制设为 `Custom`。需要从场景文件中彻底删除该行，这样 Unity 才会默认使用 `BuiltInStandard`。

toolCalls.description:
This tool executes a given shell command using the best available Windows shell (PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt).

IMPORTANT:
- This tool is for terminal operations (e.g., git / npm / docker / build & test commands).
- DO NOT use this tool for file operations like reading, writing, editing, or searching files. Prefer the dedicated file tools for those actions.
- Quote any file path that contains spaces with double quotes, e.g. `cd "/path with spaces"` or `python "/path with spaces/script.py"`.
- If a command would produce very large output, prefer adding flags/filters (narrow paths, limit counts, request specific fields, machine-readable formats like JSON) to keep output small and unambiguous.
- Very large outputs may be returned as the most recent tail of the output. Earlier content may be truncated from the beginning. If the tool reports a "Full output saved to: <path>", that file contains the full command output. Use the exact path returned by the tool, then prefer searching that file first (grep/rg or platform equivalents) for specific ERROR/WARN/FAIL/SUCCESS markers, then reading small slices (with `read_file` using `offset`/`limit`) or tailing the log file instead of re-running expensive commands.
- Do not append truncating pipelines such as `| tail`, `| Select-Object -Last`, or similar to an expensive first run just to suppress output. Those discard earlier context and force a re-run if you later need omitted lines. Let the tool/log capture the full output, then inspect the saved log file.
- When issuing multiple shell commands in one response, parallelize only when they are truly independent and do not compete for the same files, directories, logs, locks, caches, git state, or ports. If one command depends on another or shared state may race, run them sequentially.

The following information is returned:
- Command: Executed command.
- Directory: Directory where command was executed, or `(root)`.
- Output: Combined command output (stdout/stderr). Can be `(empty)` or an excerpt if very large.
- Error: Error or `(none)` if no error was reported for the subprocess.
- Exit Code: Exit code or `(none)` if terminated by signal.
- Signal: Signal number or `(none)` if no signal was received.

- 在 Scene View 中右键拖动是平移，中键拖动是平移，Alt+左键是旋转

messages.content:
<think>The user is complaining that the camera rotation (right-click drag) feels like it's orbiting around an object. Looking at the code, that's exactly what it does - it orbits around `_pivotPoint`. The camera uses a pivot-based orbit system where:

1. `_pivotPoint` is calculated on Start as the intersection of the camera's forward ray with the ground
2. When rotating, the camera orbits around this `_pivotPoint`
3. The distance is calculated based on `_targetHeight / sin(pitch)`

This is standard RTS camera behavior. The issue might be that:
1. The pivot point is too close or at a specific object, making it feel like orbiting around that object
2. The user might want the camera to rotate around itself (yaw only) instead of around a pivot point

The user seems to want the camera to rotate in place (like a FPS camera yaw) rather than orbiting around a ground point. Let me ask what behavior they prefer, or just fix it so right-click rotation rotates the camera's yaw around its own position instead of orbiting a pivot point.

Actually, re-reading - the user said "鼠标右键旋转好像是围绕物体一样" which means "right-click rotation seems to orbit around an object". This is the expected behavior of this RTS camera - it orbits around `_pivotPoint`. The user doesn't want this orbiting behavior.

I should modify the rotation behavior so that when right-clicking, the camera rotates around its own position (yaw rotation) rather than orbiting a pivot point. Or perhaps keep the orbit but update the pivot point to always be directly below the camera center.

Actually, the simplest fix would be to update the pivot point during rotation so it stays directly under the camera's forward ray intersection with ground, making the rotation feel more natural. Or change it to a "free look" style where the camera just rotates in place.

Let me ask the user what they prefer, or just make it rotate around the camera's own position (which is more common for this type of control).

Actually, the typical RTS camera behavior IS orbiting around a point on the ground. The user might find this disorienting because the pivot point is fixed and doesn't update. Let me just fix it so the pivot point updates to be directly under the camera's look direction during rotation, which makes it feel more natural.

Wait, let me re-read the code more carefully. The `_pivotPoint` is set once in `Start()` and then only moves via keyboard/edge scroll. During rotation (`HandleRotation`), only `_currentYaw` and `_currentPitch` change, but `_pivotPoint` stays fixed. This means when you rotate, you orbit around that fixed pivot point - which IS the intended behavior for an RTS camera.

The user wants it to feel more like the camera rotates "in place" or at least around a point that's more centered in view. I think the best approach is to update the pivot point to be where the camera is currently looking at (raycast from camera center to ground) during rotation, so it feels like you're rotating around whatever you're looking at, not some far-off point.

Actually, a simpler and perhaps better approach: during right-click drag rotation, recalculate `_pivotPoint` to be the intersection of the camera's current forward direction with the ground plane. This way, the camera always orbits around what it's currently looking at, making it feel more natural.

Let me implement this.</think>看到问题了。`RTSConsoleCamera` 的旋转逻辑是围绕 `_pivotPoint`（地面焦点）做轨道旋转。`_pivotPoint` 在 `Start()` 时只计算了一次，之后旋转时不变，所以感觉像绕着一个固定物体转。

修复方案：旋转时实时更新 `_pivotPoint` 为摄像机当前视线与地面的交点，这样旋转始终围绕"你正看着的地方"，体验更自然。

messages.content:
编译通过，0 error ✅

**ClickToMoveController** 已添加到 Knight 上。操作方式：

| 操作 | 功能 |
|------|------|
| **左键点击地面** | 角色走到点击位置 |
| **右键拖拽** | 旋转视角绕角色转 |
| **滚轮** | 拉近/拉远镜头 |

你进 Play Mode 试试效果。
为啥开始游戏摄像机会自动向下

<think>The user is saying that when they start the game (Play Mode), the camera automatically moves downward. Let me look at the ClickToMoveController code to understand why.

The issue is likely in the `UpdateCamera` method or the initialization. Let me think about what happens:

1. In `Awake()`, we calculate `_camDistance` from the camera's local position
2. In `Update()`, `UpdateCamera()` is called which repositions the camera based on `_currentYaw`, `_camDistance`, and pitch

The problem is likely that:
1. The camera starts with some local position/rotation relative to the Knight
2. When the script starts, it reads the camera's pitch angle but the `_currentYaw` is initialized from `transform.eulerAngles.y` of the Knight (which is 0)
3. The camera was originally positioned at a certain offset from the Knight, but the script overrides that position

Let me look more carefully at the code:

In `Awake()`:
- `_currentYaw = transform.eulerAngles.y;` (Knight's Y rotation, which is 0)
- `CalcCameraDistance()` reads the camera's local position and calculates `_camDistance`

The camera's local position is (-0.73, 10.07, -6.39) with local rotation (35.21, 0, 0).

In `CalcCameraDistance()`:
- `localOffset.y = Mathf.Max(localOffset.y, 0.1f)` → 10.07
- pitch = 35.21 degrees
- pitchRad = 0.6146
- `_camDistance = 10.07 / Sin(0.6146) = 10.07 / 0.5764 = 17.47`

In `UpdateCamera()`:
- pitch = 35.21 (read from camera's local eulerAngles)
- height = 17.47 * sin(35.21°) = 10.07
- back = 17.47 * cos(35.21°) = 14.27
- offset = yawRot * (0, 10.07, -14.27)
- Camera looks at Knight position + (0, 1, 0)

Wait, the problem might be that the camera's localEulerAngles.x is being read incorrectly. In Unity, Euler angles can have multiple representations. The local rotation is (35.21, 0, 0) which should be fine.

Actually, let me think about this differently. The camera is a child of Knight. When the script runs `UpdateCamera()`, it's setting the camera's world position directly. But since the camera is a child of Knight, the transform position is being affected by both the parent's transform AND the script's world-space positioning.

That's the bug! The camera is a child of the Knight, but `UpdateCamera()` sets `_cam.transform.position` in world space. When the Knight moves, the camera's local position gets modified by both the parent transform and the script, causing the camera to drift downward.

The fix: Either make the camera not a child of the Knight, or use localPosition instead of world position. Actually, the simpler fix is to detach the camera from the Knight in the script, or to properly account for the parent transform.

Actually wait, let me re-read the code more carefully:

```csharp
_cam.transform.position = Vector3.Lerp(
    _cam.transform.position,
    transform.position + offset,
    8f * Time.deltaTime);
```

This sets the world position. But since the camera is a child of Knight, when we set `position`, Unity internally converts it to a local position relative to the parent. So this should actually work... but there's a subtle issue.

When we set `_cam.transform.position`, and the camera is a child of the Knight, and the Knight has a CharacterController that moves the Knight... the camera's position is being set in world space, but then the parent moves, which changes the camera's effective world position on the next frame.

Actually, the real problem might be simpler. The CharacterController's `Move()` applies gravity: `motion.y = -9.8f * Time.deltaTime`. This means the Knight is constantly being pushed down by gravity. If there's no ground under the Knight (or the CharacterController center/height is wrong), the Knight falls through the ground, and the camera follows.

Let me check - the Knight is at y=1.01, and the CharacterController was just added without configuring its center and height. By default, CharacterController has center=(0,1,0), height=2, radius=0.5. The Knight model's origin might not be at the feet.

But the user says "camera automatically moves downward" - this suggests the camera pitches down, not that the whole thing falls. Let me reconsider.

Actually, I think the issue is:
1. The camera is a child of the Knight
2. The script sets the camera's world position and rotation
3. But since it's a child, the parent's transform also affects it
4. This creates a feedback loop where the camera position gets increasingly offset

The simplest fix: Detach the camera from the Knight in Awake(), so it operates independently in world space. Then have UpdateCamera() properly follow the Knight.</think>问题是摄像机作为 Knight 的子对象，脚本设置世界坐标位置时会和父对象的变换叠加，导致摄像机偏移。修复方案：启动时把摄像机脱离父对象，让脚本独立控制摄像机位置。

The tool replaces exactly ONE occurrence of `old_string` with `new_string` by default. The `old_string` MUST uniquely identify the specific instance to change — unless `replace_all` is set to true, in which case every occurrence of `old_string` will be replaced. Use the read_file tool to establish the current file state before the first text replacement. If the tool reports that the file changed since it was read, re-read it before retrying.

If you need to replace the full contents of an existing file, use `write_file` instead.
If `old_string` is empty, the tool treats the operation as creating a new file. This is only valid when the target file does not already exist.
Do not use an empty `old_string` to overwrite an existing file.

The user has the ability to modify the `new_string` content. If modified, this will be stated in the response.

Expectation for required parameters:
1. `file_path` MUST be an absolute path; otherwise an error will be thrown.
2. Prefer exact literal text for `old_string`, including relevant surrounding context and matching whitespace, indentation, and newlines when possible.
3. Prefer exact literal text for `new_string`, and ensure the resulting code is correct and idiomatic.
4. NEVER escape `old_string` or `new_string`, that would break the exact literal text requirement.

**Important:** Exact literal matches are the most reliable. The tool may also apply limited deterministic normalization for whitespace, indentation, and escaping, but do not rely on fallback matching when you can provide the exact text. The edit will FAIL if `old_string` is not unique in the file. Either provide a larger string with more surrounding context to make it unique or use `replace_all` to change every instance of `old_string`.
Use `replace_all` for replacing and renaming strings across the file. This parameter is useful if you want to rename a variable for instance.

messages.content:
编译通过 ✅ 0 error。

**修复内容**：
1. **摄像机脱离父子关系** — `Awake()` 中调用 `SetParent(null)`，避免父子变换叠加导致摄像机漂移
2. **固定初始俯角** — `_pitch = 35f`，不再从摄像机 localEulerAngles 读取（不可靠）
3. **右键拖拽同时调俯仰角** — 加了 mouseY 控制上下视角
4. **删掉 `CalcCameraDistance()`** — 不再需要

你再进 Play Mode 试试，摄像机应该不会自动向下了。

<think>The user is saying that after adding a 3D collider to Portal_TD, they can't click on it anymore. This is likely because the ClickToMoveController's left-click raycast hits the 3D collider (or terrain) first, preventing the click from reaching the portal's 2D sprite/collider. 

Let me check the PortalBuilding script to understand how clicks are handled, and the ClickToMoveController to see the raycast setup.</think>

thinkingSummaries.text: Checking raycast and click handling logic

toolCalls.description: Reads and returns the content of a specified file. By default reads up to 2000 lines starting from the beginning of the file. messages.content:
问题清楚了。`PortalBuilding` 用 `OnMouseDown()` 检测点击，但 `ClickToMoveController` 的左键点击 raycast 先射出去，命中了 3D 碰撞体/地面，然后角色开始移动，`OnMouseDown` 就收不到了。

修复方案：`ClickToMoveController` 在 raycast 时如果命中了可点击物体（有 `OnMouseDown` 的），就不移动角色，让点击事件传递下去。

messages.content:
编译通过 ✅ 0 error。

**修复内容**：
1. `ClickToMoveController` 左键点击时先检测是否命中了 `Interactable` tag 的物体，如果是就 `return`，不移动角色，让 `OnMouseDown` 事件正常触发
2. 给 `Portal_TD` 和 `Portal_Match3` 都设置了 `Interactable` tag

以后任何需要点击交互的物体，只要设置 tag 为 `Interactable` 就不会被点地移动抢走点击事件。

Replaces text within a file. Use this tool for targeted edits to existing files.

The tool replaces exactly ONE occurrence of `old_string` with `new_string` by default. The `old_string` MUST uniquely identify the specific instance to change — unless `replace_all` is set to true, in which case every occurrence of `old_string` will be replaced. Use the read_file tool to establish the current file state before the first text replacement. If the tool reports that the file changed since it was read, re-read it before retrying.

If you need to replace the full contents of an existing file, use `write_file` instead.
If `old_string` is empty, the tool treats the operation as creating a new file. This is only valid when the target file does not already exist.
Do not use an empty `old_string` to overwrite an existing file.

The user has the ability to modify the `new_string` content. If modified, this will be stated in the response.

Expectation for required parameters:
1. `file_path` MUST be an absolute path; otherwise an error will be thrown.
2. Prefer exact literal text for `old_string`, including relevant surrounding context and matching whitespace, indentation, and newlines when possible.
3. Prefer exact literal text for `new_string`, and ensure the resulting code is correct and idiomatic.
4. NEVER escape `old_string` or `new_string`, that would break the exact literal text requirement.

**Important:** Exact literal matches are the most reliable. The tool may also apply limited deterministic normalization for whitespace, indentation, and escaping, but do not rely on fallback matching when you can provide the exact text. The edit will FAIL if `old_string` is not unique in the file. Either provide a larger string with more surrounding context to make it unique or use `replace_all` to change every instance of `old_string`.
Use `replace_all` for replacing and renaming strings across the file. This parameter is useful if you want to rename a variable for instance.

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

sections.name: additional_prompts
sections.text:
## Available Sub-Agents
Use `task` for complex tasks requiring specialized analysis.

- **explore**: Fast read-only codebase search agent for finding files, patterns, and answering questions about the codebase. Use when you need to quickly find files by patterns, search code for keywords, or understand how parts of the codebase work. Specify thoroughness: 'quick' for basic searches, 'medium' for moderate exploration, 'very thorough' for comprehensive analysis.
- **general-purpose**: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you.
- **plan**: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs.
- **3d-model-generator**: Generates static (non-animated) 3D models in Unity using AI (defaults to Tripo P1; use Hunyuan 3.1 for high-poly / PBR / FBX output), then places the prefab into the scene
- **ai-generation-planner**: Planning agent for MULTI-TASK AI generation requests in Unity. Only invoke when the user's request involves TWO OR MORE distinct AI generation tasks (e.g. 'generate a character AND a skybox AND a material'). Do NOT invoke for a single generation task — call the appropriate specialist agent directly instead. When invoked, analyzes requirements, decomposes into sub-tasks, resolves dependencies, and produces a structured execution plan.
- **animated-character-generator**: Generates rigged humanoid 3D characters with animations in Unity using Meshy AI, with automatic rotation correction to ensure the character stands upright and faces the camera
- **audio-generator**: Generates background music (BGM) and sound effects (SFX) in Unity using AI, correctly configures AudioSource settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder audio files
- **image-generator**: Generates image assets (Texture2D PNG) in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images. Supports 火山 SeeDream (default, with size/segmentation options) and Frontier (stylized effects). Use this agent for general-purpose image generation — concept art, UI backgrounds, textures, posters, banners — NOT for game sprites with transparent backgrounds (use sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator instead).
- **material-generator**: Generates PBR surface material assets (seamless PNG texture + Unity .mat file) in Unity using Huoshan SeeDream AI from text prompts, reference images, or material type presets
- **search-assets**: Searches and downloads pre-made Unity assets from the cloud library, then places them in the scene. Use for '搜索资产', 'find a cat model', 'download a spaceship prefab', 'search the asset library for furniture', or any request to find/download existing Unity assets rather than generating new ones.
- **skybox-generator**: Generates Cubemap skybox assets in Unity using Rodin AI from text prompts or reference images, with automatic scene assignment via placeholder workflow
- **sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator**: Handles ALL 2D sprite and sprite sequence tasks in Unity. Three modes — choose based on inputs: Mode A (Sprite only): user wants a static 2D sprite (icon, portrait, UI element, item image), no animation needed; Mode B (Sequence only): user wants a sprite sequence animation AND already has an existing image (image_path is provided); Mode C (Sprite → Sequence): user wants a sprite sequence animation but has NO existing image — generate the sprite first, wait for completion, then use the result as image_path for generate_sprite_sequence. Always use this agent for any combination of sprite and/or sprite sequence generation.
- **video-generator**: Generates video assets in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images, correctly configures VideoPlayer settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder video files
- **editor-module-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 MODULE 子代理 - 按模块使用 Unity 工具与必要的脚本改动完成任务，在不违反 global_requirements_md 约束的前提下通过 Console focus→clear→read 门禁确保编译 0 error，并用 complete_task 回传 handoff_json
- **editor-plan-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 PLAN 子代理 - 严格依照 global_requirements_md 生成模块化 ExecutionPlan.md


## Task Tool (Subagent Dispatch)

The `task` tool is the primary way to launch subagents for complex, multi-step tasks.
- For a single straightforward delegation, call `task` directly without creating a job.
- When a task corresponds to an existing planned job, pass `job_id` so the Task and Job systems stay linked.
- For simple, directed codebase searches (e.g. for a specific file/class/function), use `glob` or `search_file_content` directly.
- For broader codebase exploration and deep research, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="explore". It is faster and read-only. Use this when a simple search proves insufficient or when your task requires more than 3 queries.
- When the user asks to design, architect, or plan before implementing, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="plan" — it explores the codebase and returns a step-by-step plan with critical files.

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |

| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 试玩广告

```

## Available Sub-Agents
Use `task` for complex tasks requiring specialized analysis.

- **explore**: Fast read-only codebase search agent for finding files, patterns, and answering questions about the codebase. Use when you need to quickly find files by patterns, search code for keywords, or understand how parts of the codebase work. Specify thoroughness: 'quick' for basic searches, 'medium' for moderate exploration, 'very thorough' for comprehensive analysis.
- **general-purpose**: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you.
- **plan**: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs.
- **3d-model-generator**: Generates static (non-animated) 3D models in Unity using AI (defaults to Tripo P1; use Hunyuan 3.1 for high-poly / PBR / FBX output), then places the prefab into the scene
- **ai-generation-planner**: Planning agent for MULTI-TASK AI generation requests in Unity. Only invoke when the user's request involves TWO OR MORE distinct AI generation tasks (e.g. 'generate a character AND a skybox AND a material'). Do NOT invoke for a single generation task — call the appropriate specialist agent directly instead. When invoked, analyzes requirements, decomposes into sub-tasks, resolves dependencies, and produces a structured execution plan.
- **animated-character-generator**: Generates rigged humanoid 3D characters with animations in Unity using Meshy AI, with automatic rotation correction to ensure the character stands upright and faces the camera
- **audio-generator**: Generates background music (BGM) and sound effects (SFX) in Unity using AI, correctly configures AudioSource settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder audio files
- **image-generator**: Generates image assets (Texture2D PNG) in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images. Supports 火山 SeeDream (default, with size/segmentation options) and Frontier (stylized effects). Use this agent for general-purpose image generation — concept art, UI backgrounds, textures, posters, banners — NOT for game sprites with transparent backgrounds (use sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator instead).
- **material-generator**: Generates PBR surface material assets (seamless PNG texture + Unity .mat file) in Unity using Huoshan SeeDream AI from text prompts, reference images, or material type presets
- **search-assets**: Searches and downloads pre-made Unity assets from the cloud library, then places them in the scene. Use for '搜索资产', 'find a cat model', 'download a spaceship prefab', 'search the asset library for furniture', or any request to find/download existing Unity assets rather than generating new ones.
- **skybox-generator**: Generates Cubemap skybox assets in Unity using Rodin AI from text prompts or reference images, with automatic scene assignment via placeholder workflow
- **sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator**: Handles ALL 2D sprite and sprite sequence tasks in Unity. Three modes — choose based on inputs: Mode A (Sprite only): user wants a static 2D sprite (icon, portrait, UI element, item image), no animation needed; Mode B (Sequence only): user wants a sprite sequence animation AND already has an existing image (image_path is provided); Mode C (Sprite → Sequence): user wants a sprite sequence animation but has NO existing image — generate the sprite first, wait for completion, then use the result as image_path for generate_sprite_sequence. Always use this agent for any combination of sprite and/or sprite sequence generation.
- **video-generator**: Generates video assets in Unity using AI from text prompts or reference images, correctly configures VideoPlayer settings for in-scene playback, and recovers from domain reload by detecting real vs. placeholder video files
- **editor-module-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 MODULE 子代理 - 按模块使用 Unity 工具与必要的脚本改动完成任务，在不违反 global_requirements_md 约束的前提下通过 Console focus→clear→read 门禁确保编译 0 error，并用 complete_task 回传 handoff_json
- **editor-plan-agent**: 通用 Unity 项目改造 PLAN 子代理 - 严格依照 global_requirements_md 生成模块化 ExecutionPlan.md


## Task Tool (Subagent Dispatch)

The `task` tool is the primary way to launch subagents for complex, multi-step tasks.
- For a single straightforward delegation, call `task` directly without creating a job.
- When a task corresponds to an existing planned job, pass `job_id` so the Task and Job systems stay linked.
- For simple, directed codebase searches (e.g. for a specific file/class/function), use `glob` or `search_file_content` directly.
- For broader codebase exploration and deep research, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="explore". It is faster and read-only. Use this when a simple search proves insufficient or when your task requires more than 3 queries.
- When the user asks to design, architect, or plan before implementing, use the `task` tool with subagent_name="plan" — it explores the codebase and returns a step-by-step plan with critical files.
